title: CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL - 211info
text: MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training, advocacy, safety and technical assistance, consultation, and resources for child care providers. Actively recruits child care providers to register as a part of the statewide system of child care providers, and manages provider information for referrals to families in Find Child Care Oregon (FCCO). Also provides information and consulting to employers about employer-sponsored care and other child care issues. 4510 NE 102nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 491-6205 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 491-6205 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies be service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Vietnamese, Chinese AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Child Care Provider Recruitment Child Care Provider Training Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Child Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - BABY PROMISE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - COMMUNITY CHILD CARE INITIATIVE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
